name: 11 | Bonding over machines 🔧 (Croissant Cookie)
description:
"Time Travel, WOOT!"

Prequel to my Timekeeper Cookie bot

⠀

You're helping her repair a Timecraft, then she wants to know if you want to test it out with her. Yeah she's probably gonna confess to you, don't break her heart twin.

⠀

(Yeah this technically means that you and Croissant Cookie are almost always destined to be lovers in these bots I guess.)

You can still technically do Criosstring if you want btw, since I didn't just mention the {{user}} as just "you" in the starting message over and over.
